signal_text: ATI brought online a new titanium alloy sheet facility in South Carolina, added a 12,500-ton billet press, and signed multi-year titanium supply agreements with both Boeing and Airbus.
llm_reason: ATI has expanded titanium capacity (new Pageland, SC facility, 12,500-ton billet press) and secured long-term agreements with Boeing and Airbus, indicating strong supply continuity but also high demand concentration in aerospace.
supplier_summary: ATI presents a low-to-moderate risk profile as a financially stable, expanding titanium supplier with strong aerospace demand, long-term agreements with Boeing and Airbus, a new six-year labor agreement, and active capacity investments, though a CFO transition introduces minor leadership continuity risk.
recommended_action: Monitor ATI's capacity utilization and delivery lead times given surging aerospace demand to ensure your titanium orders are not deprioritized.
